CAREERS
Join our team.

Our team is constantly working with top retailers in Canada to build meaningful connections with innovative and industry-leading card departments to help make the world a more thoughtful and caring place… Every. Single. Day. 

We’re at our best when associates from different backgrounds and perspectives work together as a team.

Carlton Cards aims to have a diverse workforce. We recruit, develop and grow motivated associates from different backgrounds and perspectives to help us win the ever-expanding future of celebrations.

Careers at Carlton Cards
Corporate Careers

Find your path to success at Carlton Cards. We are proud to provide challenging and rewarding work in an engaging, inclusive and innovative work environment.

Click below to visit our LinkedIn page and follow us to see when new and exciting career opportunities open to join our creative and dynamic team!

Corporate Career Opportunities
Merchandiser Careers

Merchandisers are responsible for making the greeting card department shine at retail. You will be a valued member of an engaged team who work independently to complete service schedules and order processing for greeting card departments within top Canadian Retailers.

We would love for you to join our winning team! Click below to read more about the role of a Carlton Cards G
